mapper.select: SELECT sb.member_seller_seq, sb.member_buyer_seq, sb.trade_seq, sb.sale_title, sb.book_st, sb.sale_cont, sb.sale_price, sb.delivery_cost, sb.sale_rg, sb.sale_st, sb.sale_st_dtm, sb.views, sb.wish_cnt, sb.book_sale_dtm, sb.post_no, sb.addr_h, sb.addr_d, sb.recipient_ph, sb.recipient_nm, sb.crt_dtm, sb.upd_dtm, sb.payment_type, sb.category_nm, sb.book_title, sb.book_author, sb.book_publisher, sb.book_org_price, sb.book_img, sb.isbn, sb.safe_payment_st, sb.safe_payment_expire_dtm, sb.pending_buyer_seq, sb.confirm_purchase, sb.settlement_st FROM sb_trade_info AS sb WHERE sb.trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND sb.del_dtm IS NULL
SELECT trade_seq, member_seller_seq, sale_price, delivery_cost, safe_payment_st, confirm_purchase, settlement_st FROM sb_trade_info WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND del_dtm IS NULL FOR UPDATE
SELECT book_img_seq, trade_seq, img_url, sort_seq FROM book_image WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} ORDER BY sort_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_wish ( trade_seq, member_seq, crt_dtm ) VALUES ( #{trade_seq}, #{member_seq}, now() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sb_trade_info SET sale_title = #{sale_title}, book_img = #{book_img}, book_title = #{book_title}, book_author = #{book_author}, book_publisher = #{book_publisher}, book_org_price = #{book_org_price}, isbn = #{isbn}, category_seq = #{category_seq}, category_nm = #{category_nm}, book_st = #{book_st}, sale_cont = #{sale_cont}, sale_price = #{sale_price}, delivery_cost = #{delivery_cost},
sale_rg = #{sale_rg},
sale_rg = DEFAULT(sale_rg),
upd_dtm = now() WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT category_nm, category_seq FROM category

SELECT trade_seq, member_seller_seq, book_img, book_title, sale_price, sale_title, sale_st, delivery_cost, book_st, member_seller_seq FROM sb_trade_info WHERE trade_seq = ( SELECT trade_seq FROM chatroom WHERE chat_room_seq = #{chat_room_seq} )
SELECT m.member_nicknm, m.member_email, m.member_tel_no FROM sb_trade_info s JOIN member_info m on s.member_seller_seq = m.member_seq WHERE s.trade_seq = #{trade_seq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trade_wish WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND member_seq = #{member_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT T.TRADE_SEQ, T.SALE_TITLE, T.SALE_PRICE, T.SALE_ST, T.BOOK_ST, T.SALE_RG, T.BOOK_IMG FROM sb_trade_info T JOIN trade_wish W ON T.TRADE_SEQ = W.TRADE_SEQ WHERE W.MEMBER_SEQ = #{member_seq} ORDER BY W.CRT_DTM DESC

SELECT T.TRADE_SEQ , T.SALE_TITLE , T.SALE_PRICE , T.SALE_ST , T.BOOK_ST , T.SALE_RG , T.SALE_ST_DTM , T.BOOK_IMG , T.CONFIRM_PURCHASE , T.POST_NO , T.ADDR_H , T.ADDR_D FROM sb_trade_info T WHERE T.MEMBER_BUYER_SEQ = #{member_seq} ORDER BY T.SALE_ST_DTM DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sb_trade_info SET safe_payment_st = #{status}, safe_payment_expire_dtm = NULL, pending_buyer_seq = NULL, upd_dtm = now() WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND safe_payment_st = 'PENDING'

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET safe_payment_st = #{status}, safe_payment_expire_dtm = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expire_minutes} MINUTE), pending_buyer_seq = #{pending_buyer_seq}, upd_dtm = now() WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND safe_payment_st = 'NONE'

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET safe_payment_st = 'NONE', safe_payment_expire_dtm = NULL, pending_buyer_seq = NULL, upd_dtm = now() WHERE safe_payment_st = 'PENDING' AND safe_payment_expire_dtm IS NOT NULL AND safe_payment_expire_dtm < now()
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN safe_payment_st = 'PENDING' AND safe_payment_expire_dtm IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(0, CEIL(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, NOW(), safe_payment_expire_dtm))) ELSE 0 END FROM sb_trade_info WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE sb_trade_info SET sale_st = 'SOLD', sale_st_dtm = now() WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND member_seller_seq = #{member_seq} AND sale_st = 'SALE' AND (safe_payment_st IS NULL OR safe_payment_st = 'NONE')

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET confirm_purchase = true, settlement_st = CASE WHEN safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'READY' ELSE settlement_st END WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND member_buyer_seq = #{member_seq} AND confirm_purchase = false

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET confirm_purchase = true, settlement_st = CASE WHEN safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'READY' ELSE settlement_st END WHERE confirm_purchase = false AND sale_st = 'SOLD' AND del_dtm IS NULL AND sale_st_dtm < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY)

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET sale_st = 'SOLD', sale_st_dtm = now(), book_sale_dtm = now(), member_buyer_seq = #{member_buyer_seq}, confirm_purchase = false, safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED', safe_payment_expire_dtm = NULL, pending_buyer_seq = NULL, upd_dtm = now(), post_no = #{post_no}, addr_h = #{addr_h}, addr_d = #{addr_d} WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq} AND sale_st = 'SALE' AND safe_payment_st = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sb_trade_info WHERE member_buyer_seq = #{member_seq} AND confirm_purchase IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sale_st_dtm DESC

SELECT trade_seq, book_img_seq, img_url, sort_seq FROM book_image WHERE trade_seq IN
#{seq}

SELECT COALESCE(t.safe_payment_st, 'NONE') AS safePaymentStatus, t.pending_buyer_seq AS pendingBuyerSeq, CASE WHEN t.safe_payment_st = 'PENDING' AND t.safe_payment_expire_dtm IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(0, CEIL(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, NOW(), t.safe_payment_expire_dtm))) ELSE 0 END AS remainingSeconds FROM sb_trade_info t WHERE t.trade_seq = #{trade_seq} FOR UPDATE
SELECT bi.img_url FROM book_image bi JOIN sb_trade_info t ON bi.trade_seq = t.trade_seq WHERE t.member_seller_seq = #{member_seq} AND t.del_dtm is null

SELECT trade_seq, member_seller_seq, member_buyer_seq, (SELECT member_nicknm FROM member_info WHERE member_seq = sb_trade_info.member_seller_seq) AS member_seller_nm, (SELECT member_nicknm FROM member_info WHERE member_seq = sb_trade_info.member_buyer_seq) AS member_buyer_nm, sale_title, sale_price, delivery_cost, book_title, sale_st_dtm FROM sb_trade_info WHERE payment_type = 'tosspay' AND safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' AND confirm_purchase = true
